name: Continue Later
description: Generate and manage project continuation documentation for seamless handoffs and knowledge preservation across coding sessions
author: Dhruv Anand
features: continue-later-fast: raw git dump + optional newest-mtime transcript excerpts to continuation-fast.md
No marketplace, no npm—curl and bash only
Optional Claude Code UserPromptSubmit hook (claude-code/) injects git dump before the LLM
install.sh registers Cursor beforeSubmitPrompt hook (~/.cursor/hooks.json) to run continue-later-fast on matching prompts
install.sh registers Codex UserPromptSubmit and Gemini BeforeAgent hooks when those tool homes exist
install.sh installs CLI to ~/.config/continue-later + ~/.local/bin/continue-later-fast symlink (CONTINUE_LATER_CLI_DIR / CONTINUE_LATER_BIN_DIR)
scripts/continue-later-fast.sh — usable from repo scripts/ or ~/.config after install
scripts/session_recent_user_messages.py — Claude/Cursor JSONL recent user prompts
scripts/git-context-dump.sh — single implementation for git snapshot (markdown + hook)
scripts/continue-later-prompt-hook.sh — shared prompt hook for Codex/Gemini context injection
